/bin/g++ -g CMakeFiles/cvrp_app.dir/cvrp_app_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cvrp_app.dir/main/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cvrp_app.dir/src/brute_force.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cvrp_app.dir/src/greedy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cvrp_app.dir/src/mainwindow.cpp.o -o cvrp_app  -Wl,-rpath,/home/manuel/Qt/6.11.1/gcc_64/lib /home/manuel/Qt/6.11.1/gcc_64/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.1 /home/manuel/Qt/6.11.1/gcc_64/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /home/manuel/Qt/6.11.1/gcc_64/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1 -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/manuel/Qt/6.11.1/gcc_64/lib
